title: The Empty Office Podcast – Season 3, Episode 19

title: AST Warrant Arrest: Fairbanks [AK25046472]
summary: On 05/25/2025 at 0154 hours a Trooper stopped out with an individual in possession of a motorcycle that matched the description of one that was stolen. The motorcycle was not stolen. The individual, Michael Fifer, had a warrant for his arrest. He was arrested and remanded without incident.
